name: Artichoke Squares #1
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain liquid from 1 jar of artichokes into a saucepan.
2. Drain liquid from the second jar and discard it.
3. Finely chop all the artichokes; set aside.
4. Grease a baking dish measuring 12 inches by 8 inches.
5. In the saucepan over medium heat, cook minced onion until tender.
6. Beat eggs in a bowl until blended.
7. Stir in cooked onion and chopped artichokes, mozzarella cheese, bread crumbs, parsley, salt, and pepper into the beaten eggs.
8. Spread the mixture evenly in the baking dish.
9. If not baking immediately, cover and refrigerate.
10. Preheat oven to 325°F about an hour before serving.
11. Bake the artichoke mixture for 30-35 minutes until set and lightly browned.
12. Cool for 15 minutes on a wire rack.
13. With a knife, cut lengthwise into 4 strips, then cut each strip crosswise into 6 pieces.
14. Arrange appetizer on a platter; garnish with non-toxic flowers and serve.
Makes 24 Hors D'Oeuvres.
